Explanations: You can load an audio file by clicking on the "File" button in the menu bar and then on "Load File".
You can save an audio configuration with all its tags by clicking on the "File" button in the menu bar and then on "Save State".
You can load an audio configuration with all its tags by clicking on the "File" button in the menu bar and then on "Load State".
You can add a tag to play another portion of your file by clicking on the "Add Tag" button.
You can modify tag's parameters by clicking on the "Modify Tag" button.
You can delete a tag by clicking on the "Delete Tag" button or all of them by clicking on the "Clear Tag List" button.
You can disable a tag by double clicking a tag in the list.
The tag list contain all your tags for your audio file. When you play the file, the tags are read from top to bottom.
